name: property managers handling 10-20 lease renewals/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 lease renewals/month, inefficient tenant screening causes delays in securing tenants. We simplify the process instead of manual tenant screening and lease renewal processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient tenant screening and lease renewal processes
